atlas_policy.promotion_rule: Future candidates should not be promoted past a gate if a cheap atlas prefilter fires inside the prefilter's stated claim scope.
atlas_policy.scope_warning: A grammar-local no-go only prunes that generator/search grammar. It must not be cited as a manifold-level impossibility theorem.
atlas_policy.survivor_rule: A survivor certificate must include certified survival gates, a pending next gate, and nearest no-go boundaries.

scope: Existing verified 5259/7914 radius-9, 7484, and 2544 artifacts; scoped obstruction rules, not global landscape theorems except where marked global-looking.

the operator has triplet support 1, doublet support 0, and zero dangerous 10*5bar*5bar hits under current selection rules

syndromes.claim_scope: The cohomological-degree rule is CY3-general for ordinary cup products; the replay counts are only for the represented radius-9 5259/7914 frontier.

direct_target_group.reason: the listed degree-zero monomial contributes no H1 insertion, so H1(L_12) x H1(L_12^*) lands in H2(O_X), not H3(O_X)

verdict.reason: The realized lead's only triplet-only mass support is the neutral degree-zero monomial.  This is enough for the charge/character selection-rule shadow, but it does not define a CY3 top-degree superpotential cup product: H1(L_12) x H1(L_12^*) lands in H2(O_X)=0.  A direct cubic rank computation would need a neutral degree-one singlet insertion, and none is present in the certified monomial hits for this operator.

nearest_escape_or_boundary.followup_result: degree-aware replay found 333 selection survivors with degree-one support, but all failed representative realizability
nearest_escape_or_boundary.minimal_change: add a neutralizing H1 singlet insertion so the ordinary product lands in H3(O_X)

representative_examples.reason: The realized lead's only triplet-only mass support is the neutral degree-zero monomial.  This is enough for the charge/character selection-rule shadow, but it does not define a CY3 top-degree superpotential cup product: H1(L_12) x H1(L_12^*) lands in H2(O_X)=0.  A direct cubic rank computation would need a neutral degree-one singlet insertion, and none is present in the certified monomial hits for this operator.
